ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' OCR-ed as '試験にはつしが出る！' — stylized katakana 'コレ' misread as hiragana 'つし'. Same recurring error as other pages in this chapter.

The MTBF/MTTR timeline diagram at the top of the page (showing 稼働開始, 稼働100時間/150時間/140時間, 故障50時間/70時間/60時間, the arithmetic MTBF=(100+150+140)÷3=130時間, MTTR=(50+70+60)÷3=60時間, 稼働率=130÷(130+60)≒0.68) is entirely rendered as an image placeholder in OCR. These numeric values and formula steps are key learning content.

reviewer_notes: Content page on system reliability metrics (MTBF, MTTR, 稼働率) and fault-tolerant design introduction. The body text and bullet-point exam-tip box are faithfully transcribed. However the worked-example timeline diagram containing key numeric data (100/150/140h uptime, 50/70/60h downtime, formula steps) is lost to an image placeholder — medium severity as these numbers are instructionally significant. Label 'content' is correct.
